description_long: This is a dark, medieval-style helmet constructed primarily from metal, featuring a rounded dome with a pronounced central ridge running from front to back. The front of the helmet has two large, oval eye openings and a distinctive V-shaped brow reinforcement, giving it a menacing and protective appearance. The surface is matte black with visible wear, scratches, and a slightly mottled texture, suggesting age or use. Around the lower rim, small metal loops are evenly spaced, possibly for attaching a liner or additional protective elements. The helmet lacks any visible modern features such as vents, visors, or branding, and its design is utilitarian and robust. The overall form is symmetrical, with a single vertical fin or crest at the top center, enhancing its structural integrity and visual impact.
description: A dark, medieval-style metal helmet with a central ridge, large eye openings, and a V-shaped brow, featuring a worn, matte finish and small loops around the rim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large eye openings, V-shaped brow, and central ridge running vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded dome, central ridge, and the protruding fin at the top, with loops visible along the lower edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full curvature of the helmet, the central ridge, and the evenly spaced loops around the rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the dome, central ridge, and rim loops, with the brow reinforcement partially visible.
